name: IDBI Regular Fixed Deposit
description: Bank fixed deposit across regular tenors; capital-safe with a rate that varies by how long you lock it in.

name: IDBI Senior Citizen FD
expected_return: up to 7.10% p.a. (general rate +0.50%, as of 23 Feb 2026)
description: Fixed deposit with an additional interest premium for senior citizens.

name: IDBI Chiranjeevi FD
description: Special fixed deposit for super-senior citizens aged 80 and above.

name: IDBI Suvidha Tax-Saving FD
expected_return: 6.25% p.a. general / 6.75% senior, 5-year lock-in (as of 23 Feb 2026)
description: Tax-saving fixed deposit (Section 80C) with a mandatory 5-year lock-in, capped at Rs 1.5 lakh a year.

name: IDBI Utsav FD (555/700 days)
expected_return: 6.40-6.45% p.a. general / 6.90-6.95% senior (limited period, through 30 Sep 2026)
description: Special-tenor, limited-period fixed deposit offered at a premium over the regular FD rate.

name: IDBI Recurring Deposit
description: Fixed monthly instalment savings that builds a corpus with assured interest, from a low Rs 500/month entry.

name: Public Provident Fund (PPF)
description: Government-backed long-term savings scheme; annual contributions of Rs 500 to Rs 1.5 lakh, fully tax-exempt (EEE).

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
description: Government savings scheme for a girl child's education or marriage, opened any time before she turns 10.

name: Senior Citizens Savings Scheme
description: Government scheme for 60+ investors with a quarterly interest payout and Section 80C benefit.

name: National Pension System (NPS)
description: Government retirement scheme via IDBI Bank as a PFRDA point of presence; contributions grow until 60, then pay out as a lump sum plus pension.

name: RBI Floating Rate Savings Bond 2020
description: Sovereign-backed bond with a floating coupon; capital-safe with periodic interest payout. Not available to NRIs.

name: RBI Retail Direct G-Secs / T-Bills
expected_return: market yield at issue (varies by tenor)
description: Direct sovereign-security investing via the RBI Retail Direct scheme, subscribed through IDBI Bank.

name: Index Fund SIP (Direct Plan)
expected_return: ~11% p.a. (illustrative, historical Nifty 50 index return; market-linked, not guaranteed)
description: Low-cost passive SIP tracking a broad market index, held via a direct plan (execution-only, no advisory push).

name: ELSS Tax-Saver Fund (Direct Plan)
description: Equity-linked tax-saving fund with a 3-year lock-in and Section 80C benefit, held via a direct plan.

name: Liquid Fund (Direct Plan)
description: Very short-duration debt fund for parking idle cash with near-instant access, held via a direct plan.

name: Actively Managed Equity Fund
expected_return: ~13% p.a. (illustrative historical category average; market-linked, not guaranteed)
description: Actively managed equity mutual fund suited to a personalised push — reviewed and placed by your Relationship Manager, never auto-executed.

name: Term Life Insurance (Ageas Federal Life)
expected_return: protection cover; premium varies by age and sum assured
description: Pure protection term cover distributed by IDBI Bank as a corporate agent for Ageas Federal Life; reviewed by an RM before purchase.

name: ULIP (Ageas Federal Life)
description: Unit-linked insurance plan combining market-linked investment with life cover; always RM-reviewed, never auto-executed.

name: Health Insurance (Niva Bupa / Tata AIG)
expected_return: protection cover; premium varies by age, sum insured and plan
description: Health cover distributed through IDBI Bank's insurance partners; reviewed by an RM before purchase.

name: General Insurance (Tata AIG / New India Assurance)
expected_return: protection cover; premium varies by asset and plan
description: Motor, home and travel cover distributed through IDBI Bank's general-insurance partners; reviewed by an RM before purchase.

name: Portfolio Management Services (IDBI Capital)
description: Discretionary portfolio management via IDBI Capital Markets & Securities — routed to the wealth desk, never auto-executed.

name: Alternative Investment Fund (IDBI Capital)
description: SEBI-registered alternative investment fund via IDBI Capital Markets & Securities — wealth-desk only.

name: IDBI Capital Wealth Management (Advisory-Led)
description: Bespoke, advisory-led wealth management for affluent and HNI customers via IDBI Capital — RM/wealth-desk only.

name: IDBI Direct - Demat & Trading
description: Digital-KYC demat and trading account via IDBI Capital for self-directed equity execution.

name: NRE Savings / Term Deposit
expected_return: ~6.20% p.a. (1-year FD, tax-free in India, fully repatriable)
description: Rupee deposit for NRIs; interest is tax-free in India, and both principal and interest are fully repatriable.

name: NRO Savings / Term Deposit
expected_return: FD-slab rate; interest taxable in India
description: Rupee account/deposit for an NRI's India-sourced income (rent, dividends); repatriation is capped and interest is taxable.

name: FCNR(B) Deposit (USD)
expected_return: USD 4.55% p.a. (1-2yr) sliding to USD 3.15% p.a. (5yr), as of 1 Jul 2026
description: Foreign-currency deposit for NRIs, USD 1,000 minimum equivalent; no exchange-rate risk on principal, tax-free interest, fully repatriable.
